title: Case with sliding automatic roller system
abstract: The invention relates to case (K) structuring used for the protection of portable electronic devices such as smartphones, tablet PCs and laptops. The invention particularly relates to automatic case (K) which comprises; cover (4) that is positioned on the said case (K) and that opens and closes the screen of the device (3) by means of scrolling via the spring (8) towards back, bottom, top or right or left of the case body (1) according to use and at least one spring (8) positioned inside the mechanism compartment (7) of the said case body (1) and controlling the cover (4) to be automatically scrolled and opened.
claims: Claims The invention is a case (K) structuring, wherein it is used for the protection of portable electronic devices such as smartphones, tablet PCs and laptops; â¢ wherein it comprises case body (1), which has all the elements, surrounding the parts of the device (3) except the screen after the device (3) is inserted through the open side of it, â¢ Side cover (2) that closes the side edge of the said case body (1) after the device is placed in it, â¢ Mechanism compartment (7) that is formed between the case (K) and the device (3) wherein the cover (4) is positioned when scrolled, Characterized in that it comprises; â¢ Cover (4) that is positioned on the said case (K) and that opens and closes the screen of the device (3) by means of scrolling via the spring (8) towards back, bottom, top or right or left of the case body (1) according to use, â¢ At least one spring (8) positioned inside the mechanism compartment (7) of the said case body (1) and controlling the cover (4) to be scrolled in the form of rolling and opened automatically A case (K) structuring according to claim 1 , characterized in that the said spring (8) is helical spring.
